headline: AJG Expands Its Employee Benefits Segment With Cincinnati Acquisition
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher expands its employee benefits platform with a Cincinnati-based acquisition, adding scale in a recurring-revenue business.

headline: Aon's Final Year of the 3x3 Plan: Is the Strategy Delivering?
summary: AON enters the final year of its 3x3 Plan with revenue, margin and cash flow gains fueled by AI, analytics, client expansion and NFP integration.

raw.headline: Aon's Final Year of the 3x3 Plan: Is the Strategy Delivering?
raw.summary: AON enters the final year of its 3x3 Plan with revenue, margin and cash flow gains fueled by AI, analytics, client expansion and NFP integration.

headline: 1 Services Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Find Risky
summary: Business services providers use their specialized expertise to help enterprises streamline operations and cut costs. Furthermore, the demand for their offerings is rising as more clients outsource non-core functions, a trend that has enabled the industry to return 7.7% over the past six months, almost identical to the S&P 500.
